'''wadhotho''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:mfger|mfger]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| w-dh-th
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:mfger|mfger]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| wadhotho
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:wædhetheth|wædhetheth]] || [[word:wædhethej|wædhethej]] || [[word:wædhethesh|wædhethesh]] || [[word:wædhethe|wædhethe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:wadhodhothoth|wadhodhothoth]] || [[word:wadhodhothoj|wadhodhothoj]] || [[word:wadhodhothosh|wadhodhothosh]] || [[word:wadhodhotho|wadhodhotho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:wadhothoth|wadhothoth]] || [[word:wadhothoj|wadhothoj]] || [[word:wadhothosh|wadhothosh]] || [[word:wadhotho|wadhotho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:wadhofthoth|wadhofthoth]] || [[word:wadhofthoj|wadhofthoj]] || [[word:wadhofthosh|wadhofthosh]] || [[word:wadhofthof|wadhofthof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:wadhothotho|wadhothotho]] || [[word:wadhothojo|wadhothojo]] || [[word:wadhothosho|wadhothosho]] || [[word:wadhothoko|wadhothoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:wadhothoth|wadhothoth]] || [[word:wadhothoj|wadhothoj]] || [[word:wadhothosh|wadhothosh]] || [[word:wadhotho|wadhotho]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:wadhothothol|wadhothothol]] || [[word:wadhothojol|wadhothojol]] || [[word:wadhothoshol|wadhothoshol]] || [[word:wadhothokol|wadhothokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:wadhothothotho|wadhothothotho]] || [[word:wadhothojojo|wadhothojojo]] || [[word:wadhothoshosho|wadhothoshosho]] || [[word:wadhothoko|wadhothoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:wadhothothon|wadhothothon]] || [[word:wadhothojon|wadhothojon]] || [[word:wadhothoshon|wadhothoshon]] || [[word:wadhothokon|wadhothokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:wadhothothoro|wadhothothoro]] || [[word:wadhothojoro|wadhothojoro]] || [[word:wadhothoshoro|wadhothoshoro]] || [[word:wadhothokoro|wadhothokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|386eaa0}}
